---
title: "Projects"
---

Below is a selection of some of my projects.

---

## Data Science Projects

### [Canadian Migrant Education Analysis](project-migrant.qmd)
*Python · Pandas · Shiny · Plotly · Altair*

An interactive Shiny app exploring migrant education trends in Canada. Filter and compare indicators across regions and time to uncover patterns in access, participation, and outcomes.

[Learn More →](project-migrant.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}

---

### [Vancouver Food Finder](project-vancouver.qmd)
*Python · Shiny · Plotly · Kepler.gl · ipyleaflet · DuckDB*

A map-based dashboard helping Vancouver residents find free or low-cost food supports. Filter by service type, cost, and access requirements to discover programs nearby.

[Learn More →](project-vancouver.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}

---

*Want to collaborate? [Get in touch](mailto:onyebuchijennifere@gmail.com).*
